description: Transform the messy financial aid data into the exact format required by the scholarship application portal. Standardize dates, number formats, and categories, calculate all required derived fields, and export the compliant CSV to /home/ga/Documents/formatted_financial_aid.csv.

natural_language.prompt: A student needs to format their financial aid data for a scholarship application. The source data has inconsistent date formats, text-formatted numbers, wrong category names, and missing required columns. Transform the data to meet exact scholarship portal specifications and export as CSV.
